calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deponent Christian Isam Baba To Produce Documents Demanded By The Deposition Notice
Off Calendar May-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KIERAN FARR's Motion To Compel Deponent Christian Isam Baba To Produce Documents Demanded By The Deposition Notice.

Plaintiff Kieran Farr's Motion to Compel Deponent Christian Isam Baba to Produce Documents Demanded by the Deposition Notice is DENIED.

On April 9, 2025, Plaintiff served a Second Amended Notice of Deposition that does not include a production demand. (Ganapathy Decl., par. 7, Ex. F.) That second amended notice supersedes the prior notices and the production demand is now moot. The court further notes that the deposition occurred on April 16, 2025, and Defendant produced the documents. (Id. at pars. 8-9; Ex. H.)

While the court is not convinced Plaintiff acted with substantial justification as to discovery, the court finds the overall circumstances make sanction inappropriate.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN BABA's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Feb-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN BABA's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests.

Before the court is Defendant Christian Isam Baba's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests to which no opposition has yet been filed. In light of Plaintiff's counsel's recent entry into the case, the court continues this motion to February 27, 2025, at 9:00 am in this department. The court orders counsel to meet and confer in person, by telephone or by videoconference as soon as practical but in no event later than January 27, 2025 close of business. COUnsel shall try to resolve issues regarding discovery responses and sanctions Any opposition to this motion must be filed no later than February 111, 2025. Any reply to that opposition must be filed no later than February 18, 2025. Hard copy courtesy copies must be delivered to this department within 24 hours of the filing of the papers.

Moving Party is advised that stacked discovery motions are disfavored. Stacked motions may be ordered off calendar in favor of individual motions focused each on a single discovery vehicle (e.g., Frog Set, SRog Set, RFP Set, RFA Set, deposition notice) addressed to a single party. (Notably, though, if a stacked motion is ever appropriate it is where, as here, the responding party has provided no response at all to discovery requests served together at the same time.)

The parties are advised if discovery disputes persist, the court, at the parties' expense, may appoint a discovery referee. The court may continue the next discovery motion to give the parties time to seek appointment of a referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
